cards.back: An open-source, collaborative project to develop and maintain a family of blockchain protocols
A distributed ledger technology (DLT) that enables the development of blockchain networks for enterprise use cases
A blockchain-based platform developed by Intel, designed for building and managing supply chain management systems
A distributed ledger platform developed by R3, designed for building enterprise-grade blockchain networks

cards.front: What is the main difference between Hyperledger and Sawtooth Lake?
cards.back: Hyperledger is a more general-purpose blockchain platform, while Sawtooth Lake is specifically designed for supply chain management
